docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,350.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, MARIO A AS TO DEFENDANT FPI MANAGEMENT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 SERVED JUL-01-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FPI MANAGEMENT, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-07-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA, APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MARIO GONZALEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FPI MANAGEMENT, INC (DENNIS TREADAWAY) IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, MARIO A
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DENNIS TREADAWAY FILED BY DEFENDANT FPI MANAGEMENT, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, MARIO A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FPI MANAGEMENT, INC. $5,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,475.00, THE COURT FINDS BAD FAITH ON THE PART OF THE MANAGEMENT COMPANY REPRESENTING THE LANDLORD AT THE TIME THAT TENANT VACATED THE UNIT UNDER CC 1950.5(M). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FPI MANAGEMENT, INC.
